# VTaBridge

> 世界の優秀なエンジニアと日本企業をつなぐ架け橋に。
> The bridge connecting world-class engineers with Japanese companies.

VTaBridge is a B2B engineer resource coordination service that connects Japanese companies with highly skilled overseas engineers. We provide immediate, flexible access to global engineering talent without the overhead of traditional hiring.

## Pages

- [Home](https://t-taka-touhu.vercel.app/): Overview of VTaBridge's service and value proposition
- [About VTaBridge](https://t-taka-touhu.vercel.app/about): Mission, vision, founder profile, and company values
- [Company Overview](https://t-taka-touhu.vercel.app/company): Company information and corporate profile
- [Services](https://t-taka-touhu.vercel.app/services): Detailed service offerings, tech stack, process flow, and comparison
- [Contact](https://t-taka-touhu.vercel.app/contact): Inquiry form and contact information

## Services

1. **Overseas Engineer Outsourcing & Development** — Requirements hearing, candidate proposal, contract management, and weekly progress reporting
2. **Contract Product Development** — Full-cycle product development from requirements definition through delivery
3. **Product Offering (Coming Soon)** — In-house SaaS and digital products under development

## Technology Stack

- Backend: Java, Python, PHP, Go, Node.js
- Frontend: React, Vue
- Cloud: AWS, Azure, GCP
